en.title: Web Development in Adelaide | Digital Solutions Partner
en.description: Top-rated web development in Adelaide. We build robust and modern websites focusing on SEO and performance.
en.h1: Defence & Innovation Web Engineering for Adelaide Enterprises
en.p: AVPdev builds secure, scalable Next.js platforms and intelligent automation for Adelaide's defence, agtech, and manufacturing sectors.

benefits.title: Elite Web Performance for Adelaide
benefits.desc: We build Astro and Next.js websites for Adelaide's defense and tech industries, achieving 90+ Lighthouse scores and top search rankings.

benefits.title: Intelligent Automation Bots
benefits.desc: Custom Telegram bots for Adelaide businesses: lead capture, notifications, and 24/7 customer service on autopilot.

faq.q: What is the cost of web development in Adelaide?
faq.a: Pricing starts from $250 for Astro landing pages and $300 for Next.js websites. Custom web applications start from $750.
Astro landing pages take 7–14 days. Full Next.js websites take 2–4 weeks, and complex custom systems take 4–12 weeks.

faq.q: Do you develop Telegram bots and Mini Apps?
faq.a: Yes, we build intelligent bots for business automation. Prices start from $50 depending on the requirements.
Yes, we offer 12 months of technical support after launch, including bug fixes, uptime monitoring, and consultations.

faq.q: What tech stack do you use?
faq.a: We specialize in Next.js, React, Node.js, and Astro. This stack ensures the best performance, scalability, and SEO results.
